channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (short_term)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Madison Beer @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-06-24 02:30 — Madison Beer at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Madison Beer is a rising pop star with a strong online following and a reputation for captivating live performances.

item.title: Pomplamoose @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-06-27 03:00 — Pomplamoose at The Fillmore. Pomplamoose blends indie pop with unique covers, known for their engaging live shows.

item.title: Holly Humberstone @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-06-29 03:00 — Holly Humberstone at The Fillmore. Holly Humberstone is an exciting new artist with a compelling narrative and a growing fanbase.

item.title: Joshua Slone @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-07-01 03:00 — Joshua Slone at The Fillmore. Joshua Slone's tour is generating buzz, showcasing his unique sound and storytelling.

item.title: Marcus King Band @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-07-08 03:00 — Marcus King Band at Fox Theater - Oakland. Dillstradamus (Dillon Francis B2B Flosstradamus) promises a high-energy electronic experience.

item.title: Metric @ The Masonic
item.description: 2026-06-22 02:00 → 2026-06-23 02:00 — Metric at The Masonic. The ALL THE FEELINGS TOUR features notable indie acts Metric, Broken Social Scene, and Stars, appealing to a diverse audience.

item.title: A$AP Rocky @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-06-26 03:30 — A$AP Rocky at Chase Center. A$AP Rocky's tour is highly anticipated, showcasing his influence in hip-hop.

item.title: Jon Anderson @ San Jose Civic
item.description: 2026-07-01 03:00 — Jon Anderson at San Jose Civic. Jon Anderson's collaboration with The Band Geeks offers a unique twist on classic rock.

item.title: IVE @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-08-05 03:00 — IVE at Oakland Arena. IVE's world tour is a significant event in the K-pop scene, attracting a dedicated fanbase.

item.title: LE SSERAFIM @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-09-24 02:30 — LE SSERAFIM at SAP Center at San Jose. LE SSERAFIM's tour is a major event in the K-pop landscape, promising a vibrant performance.

item.title: Benson Boone @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-08-08 03:00 — Benson Boone at SAP Center at San Jose. Benson Boone is gaining traction with his unique sound and engaging performances.

item.title: Rainbow Kitten Surprise @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-19 03:00 — Rainbow Kitten Surprise at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Rainbow Kitten Surprise is known for their energetic performances and unique sound.

item.title: Bob Moses @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-18 02:30 — Bob Moses at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Bob Moses & Cannons are set to deliver a captivating electronic music experience.

item.title: Muse @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-08-28 02:00 — Muse at Shoreline Amphitheatre. Muse's upcoming tour is highly anticipated, known for their elaborate live shows.

item.title: Tedeschi Trucks Band @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-08-13 01:00 — Tedeschi Trucks Band at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Tedeschi Trucks Band offers a powerful blend of rock and blues, appealing to a wide audience.

item.title: Jack Johnson @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-10-01 01:30 — Jack Johnson at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Jack Johnson's tour is expected to attract a loyal fanbase with his laid-back style.

item.title: Los Tucanes De Tijuana @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-06-27 02:00 — Los Tucanes De Tijuana at Oakland Arena. LOS TUCANES, EL FANTASMA y LA DIFERENCIA offer a vibrant experience in the regional Mexican genre.

item.title: Micky Dolenz @ Uptown Theatre Napa
item.description: 2026-07-20 03:00 — Micky Dolenz at Uptown Theatre Napa. J. Cole's tour is highly anticipated, showcasing his significant impact on hip-hop.
